name: File Time Attribute Change - Linux
notes:
Converted from SIGMA Rule.

Original Author: Igor Fits, oscd.community
SIGMA Title: File Time Attribute Change - Linux
SIGMA Description: Detect file time attribute change to hide new or changes to existing files.

False positives:
- Unknown

This rule may be covered under the Detection Rule License: https://ibm.biz/SigmaDetectionRuleLicense
conditions_text: when the event matches devicetype=11 AND LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%execve%' AND LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%touch%' AND (LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%-t%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%-acmr%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%-d%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%-r%') AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY File Time Attribute Change - Linux on events which are detected by the LOCAL system

AND when the event matches devicetype=11 AND LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%execve%' AND LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%touch%' AND (LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%-t%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%-acmr%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%-d%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%-r%') AQL filter query
RED_list: Event name: File Time Attribute Change - Linux
